2604.15093.title: OpenMobile: Building Open Mobile Agents with Task and Trajectory Synthesis
2604.15093.paper_summary: Mobile agents powered by vision-language models have demonstrated impressive capabilities in automating mobile tasks, with recent leading models achieving a marked performance leap, e.g., nearly 70% success on AndroidWorld. However, these systems keep their training data closed and remain opaque about their task and trajectory synthesis recipes. We present OpenMobile, an open-source framework that synthesizes high-quality task instructions and agent trajectories, with two key components: (1) The first is a scalable task synthesis pipeline that constructs a global environment memory from exploration, then leverages it to generate diverse and grounded instructions. and (2) a policy-switching strategy for trajectory rollout. By alternating between learner and expert models, it captures essential error-recovery data often missing in standard imitation learning. Agents trained on our data achieve competitive results across three dynamic mobile agent benchmarks: notably, our fine-tuned Qwen2.5-VL and Qwen3-VL reach 51.7% and 64.7% on AndroidWorld, far surpassing existing open-data approaches. Furthermore, we conduct transparent analyses on the overlap between our synthetic instructions and benchmark test sets, and verify that performance gains stem from broad functionality coverage rather than benchmark overfitting. We release data and code at https://njucckevin.github.io/openmobile/ to bridge the data gap and facilitate broader mobile agent research.
2604.15093.paper_summary_zh: 行動代理人由視覺-語言模型驅動，已展示出在自動化行動任務方面的卓越能力，最近的領先模型在性能上實現了顯著的飛躍，例如，在AndroidWorld上接近70%的成功率。 然而，這些系統保持其訓練數據的封閉性，對其任務和軌跡合成的配方仍然不透明。我們提出了OpenMobile，一個開源框架，能夠合成高品質的任務指令和代理軌跡，具有兩個關鍵組件：(1) 第一個是可擴展的任務合成管道，該管道從探索中構建全球環境記憶，然後利用它生成多樣且有根據的指令。 (2) 一種用於軌跡展開的策略切換策略。通過在學習者和專家模型之間交替，它捕捉到標準模仿學習中常常缺失的重要錯誤恢復數據。基於我們的數據訓練的代理在三個動態行動代理基準上達到了競爭性的結果：值得注意的是，我們微調的Qwen2.5-VL和Qwen3-VL在AndroidWorld上分別達到51.7%和64.7%，遠超現有的開放數據方法。此外，我們對我們的合成指令和基準測試集之間的重疊進行了透明分析，並驗證性能提升源於廣泛的功能覆蓋，而非基準過擬合。我們在https://njucckevin.github.io/openmobile/上發布數據和代碼，以填補數據空白並促進更廣泛的行動代理研究。
2604.15093.author: Kanzhi Cheng et.al.
2604.15093.authors: Kanzhi Cheng, Zehao Li, Zheng Ma, Nuo Chen, Jialin Cao, Qiushi Sun, Zichen Ding, Fangzhi Xu, Hang Yan, Jiajun Chen, Anh Tuan Luu, Jianbing Zhang, Lewei Lu, Dahua Lin
